description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:3.1 Docker image, caches the vendor/ directory, and runs bundle install --path vendor in a before_script. Define a single stage named deploy and a pages job that runs in that stage. The pages job should execute bundle exec jekyll build -d public/, publish the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and only run on the master branch. Ensure the job is configured for GitLab Pages deployment.
